name: Swarm of Insects

traits.name: Immunities
traits.text: Charmed, Frightened, Grappled, Paralyzed, Petrified, Prone, Restrained, Stunned

traits.name: Swarm
traits.text: The swarm can occupy another creature’s space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny piranha. The swarm can’t regain Hit Points or gain Temporary Hit Points.

traits.name: Water Breathing
traits.text: The swarm can breathe only underwater.

text:
# Swarm of Insects

*Medium Swarm of Tiny Beasts, Unaligned*

### Actions

**Bites.** Melee Attack Roll: +5 (with Advantage if the target doesn’t have all its Hit Points), reach 5 ft. Hit: 8 (2d4 + 3) Piercing damage, or 5 (1d4 + 3) Piercing damage if the swarm is Bloodied.
